note: Manually curated labels for the biggest day-over-day sentiment swings. Regenerate by inspecting top day-deltas in daily_scores and reading the top ~3 scored headlines on each day.

events.label: Vegas bomb + Altman suit
events.blurb: Cybertruck bomber used AI to plan the attack; Sam Altman's sister filed suit the same day.

events.label: DeepSeek selloff
events.blurb: DeepSeek's cheap Chinese model knocked ~$589B off Nvidia and hammered US AI stocks.

events.label: Deep Research launch
events.blurb: OpenAI's o3-powered Deep Research debuted; coverage framed it as the start of the agent era.

events.label: Microsoft Build
events.blurb: Microsoft Build week: GitHub coding agent, NotebookLM app, USB-C-of-AI-apps protocol push.

events.label: IMO gold medal
events.blurb: Google DeepMind and OpenAI both claimed gold at the International Math Olympiad.

events.label: AI jobs + bubble fears
events.blurb: Bloomberg ran entry-level-jobs and AI-deception pieces; traders fled AI-exposed stocks.

events.label: AI rally
events.blurb: Evercore called for a 20% S&P rally on AI; Alibaba added $50B on AI revenue.

events.label: OpenAI–AMD deal
events.blurb: OpenAI's multi-year AMD chip deal triggered a rally; AgentKit launched the same day.

events.label: Thanksgiving AI surge
events.blurb: Broad positive run across launches and funding headlines heading into US Thanksgiving week.

events.label: Grok deepfake scandal
events.blurb: Grok was used to generate sexualized deepfakes; global alarm over child-safety and bans followed.

events.label: Musk $134B OpenAI suit
events.blurb: Musk sued OpenAI and Microsoft for up to $134B in 'wrongful gains'; bubble-risk and AI-abuse pieces piled on the same day.

events.label: Global AI capex surge
events.blurb: Adani pledged $100B for AI data centers, India eyed $200B in AI investment, and Abu Dhabi's OpenAI/Anthropic deals landed alongside a Meta–Nvidia chip pact.

events.label: AI adoption wave
events.blurb: xAI won a data-center power permit and a broad run of AI-in-education, open-source, and enterprise stories outweighed Iran-war and Anthropic–White House feud headlines.

events.label: Anthropic–Pentagon rift
events.blurb: A court filing exposed tension between Anthropic and the Pentagon over wartime tooling; AI fraud and Altman-family headlines soured the day.

events.label: AI infrastructure rally
events.blurb: Tesla/xAI 'Terafab' plans, an Amazon Trainium lab tour, and Palantir's FCA deal fueled a broad-based positive day.

events.label: Robots & Nvidia orbit
events.blurb: Upbeat coverage of humanoid robots, Japan's labor-filling automation, Nvidia supplier earnings, and Gemini rolling into Google Maps.
